prompt: Tap small blind seat before out-of-position depth action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before stack-depth decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Small blind is the seat anchor because that partly committed seat has to act first and absorbs the depth pressure earliest.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The small blind is the right anchor here because that seat is partly committed and has to act first out of position.
